---
title: "Chapter X - [Chapter Title]"
author: "Prof. Barker"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 1
    number-sections: true
    number-offset: 0
    title-block-style: default
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    geometry: margin=1in
---

# Introduction

**"[Opening quote or provocative statement relevant to the chapter.]"**

[2–3 sentences framing the chapter topic. Why does it matter? Connect it to something students already know or experience.]

**Think about this:** "[A question to engage students and connect the topic to real life.]"

## Chapter Roadmap {.unnumbered}

This chapter covers four major topics:

1. **[Section 1 Title]** — [One-line description]
2. **[Section 2 Title]** — [One-line description]
3. **[Section 3 Title]** — [One-line description]
4. **[Section 4 Title]** — [One-line description]

---

# [Section 1 Title]

[Introductory paragraph for this section. Set up the key idea before diving into subsections.]

## [Subsection 1.1 Title]

[Explanation of concept. Use plain language first, then introduce formal definitions.]

**Key Definition:** [Term] — [Definition in plain language.]

- Bullet point supporting detail
- Bullet point supporting detail
- Bullet point supporting detail

## [Subsection 1.2 Title]

[Continue explanation. Use examples, analogies, or visuals where helpful.]

**Example:**

[Walk through a concrete example here.]

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: chXX-example-1

# [Brief comment explaining what this code does]

# Example R code here
x <- c(1, 2, 3)
y <- x * 2
cat("Result:", y, "\n")
```

---

# [Section 2 Title]

[Introductory paragraph for this section.]

## [Subsection 2.1 Title]

[Content here.]

**Critical Point:** [Highlight an important concept, common misconception, or key takeaway.]

## [Subsection 2.2 Title]

[Content here. Consider adding a figure or table.]

![Figure Caption](../assets/images/ChXX/your_image.png){width="75%"}

---

# [Section 3 Title]

[Introductory paragraph for this section.]

## [Subsection 3.1 Title]

[Content here.]

## [Subsection 3.2 Title]

[Content here.]

#### Practice Problem {.unnumbered}

[State a practice problem here that applies the concepts just covered.]

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: practice-chXX

# Solution to practice problem
# Students should attempt before reviewing

# [Your R code here]
```

---

# [Section 4 Title]

[Introductory paragraph for this section.]

## [Subsection 4.1 Title]

[Content here.]

## [Subsection 4.2 Title]

[Content here.]

---

# Conclusion and Synthesis

## Connecting the Dots

Let's bring together the major themes from this chapter:

#### [Section 1 Theme] {.unnumbered}

- Key takeaway 1
- Key takeaway 2

#### [Section 2 Theme] {.unnumbered}

- Key takeaway 1
- Key takeaway 2

#### [Section 3 Theme] {.unnumbered}

- Key takeaway 1
- Key takeaway 2

#### [Section 4 Theme] {.unnumbered}

- Key takeaway 1
- Key takeaway 2

## Why This Matters

[2–3 sentences connecting the chapter content to careers, citizenship, or personal finance — as relevant.]

## Practical Advice for This Chapter

#### Stay Current {.unnumbered}

- [Suggest a news source, data release, or real-world event related to this chapter's topic]

#### Think Critically {.unnumbered}

- [Prompt students to question an assumption or consider an alternative view]

---

## Preview of Next Chapter

**What's next — Chapter X+1: [Next Chapter Title]**

- [Topic 1 coming up]
- [Topic 2 coming up]
- [Topic 3 coming up]

---

## Final Thoughts

[2–3 closing sentences. Reinforce the big idea of the chapter and motivate students to engage with the material.]

Please review Chapter X, complete any assigned problems, and don't hesitate to email with questions.
